title: Portfolio - private project

posts.author: Abricoo (M.CH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a message appearing on the project portfolio. After investigating, I can’t find a solution. ”You cannot access this project because one or more projects linked to this portfolio is/are private.”

image366×152 8.08 KB

Do you have any idea what the cause is ?

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
There will be a private board linked to this in some way.

Do you know who the admin is on the account, or the board/project owner?

posts.author: Abricoo (M.CH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, I am the administrator of this account.
All projects are identical in terms of authorization.

posts.author: LHo (Leander Hobusch | monday.com ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having the same nightmare and found one explanation: You need to be part of the desired project and in some cases even part of all projects in one portfolio, to switch via the indicated button between portfolio and respective project.

In one other instance I lost the opportunity because I made the portfolio shareable with external guests. For (data) privacy reasons the option vanished, even if the external guests wern’t part of the projects I tried to reach.

Maybe one is the case here as well?
